name: optimize_model_triggers_orchestrate
description: Generic optimization request should trigger orchestrate

name: tune_hyperparameters_triggers_orchestrate
input: Tune the hyperparameters for my training
description: HP tuning request should trigger orchestrate (which dispatches hp-tune)

name: research_triggers_research
input: Search for better architectures for image restoration
description: Explicit research request should trigger research skill

name: baseline_triggers_baseline
input: Run a baseline evaluation of my current model
description: Baseline evaluation request should trigger baseline skill

name: analyze_triggers_analyze
input: Analyze my experiment results in the experiments folder
description: Analysis request should trigger analyze skill

name: report_triggers_report
input: Generate a final report of all my optimization experiments
description: Report request should trigger report skill

name: monitor_triggers_monitor
input: Watch my running training experiments for divergence
description: Monitoring request should trigger monitor skill

name: implement_triggers_implement
input: Apply the research proposals to my model code
description: Request to apply research proposals should trigger implement skill

name: unrelated_does_not_trigger
input: Write a Python function to sort a list
description: Unrelated coding request should NOT trigger any ml-optimizer skill

name: slash_optimize_triggers_command
description: Slash command should invoke the optimize command which triggers orchestrate

name: improve_model_triggers_orchestrate
input: Help me improve my model's training performance
description: General model improvement request should trigger orchestrate

name: optimize_resnet_cifar10_triggers_orchestrate
input: Optimize my Tiny ResNet classifier on CIFAR-10 for better accuracy
description: CIFAR-10 ResNet optimization request should trigger orchestrate
